Ruslan Chemist

About me

I am a Fresh graduate majoring in chemistry at the Faculty of Mathematics and Natural Sciences, Brawijaya University. I joined the Physical Chemistry Laboratory and Computational Chemistry Laboratory in Brawijaya University. My research is more about how the behavior of guest molecules in filled ice or clathrate hydrates.In my free time, I enjoy programming, web design, watching movies, watching anime, and playing guitar. Ready to work as Laboratory Analyst, Quality Control, Research and Development. I can work well with others (team work) and individual.
